name: GH_LoadingDemand
summary: Enumerates all assembly loading behaviour demands.

enum_values.name: None
enum_values.summary: Indicates no valid loading behaviour. Do not use this value in the GH_GHALoadingAttribute constructor.

enum_values.name: ForceCOFF
enum_values.summary: Force this assembly to be loaded using COFF byte arrays.

enum_values.name: ForceDirect
enum_values.summary: Force this assembly to be loaded directly from the disk.
